metrics.name: k6SuccessRatio
metrics.query: sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"505adc35-02c2-4b8d-8711-ce4775f57ed9", expected_response="true", scenario!="default"}[1m])) / sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"505adc35-02c2-4b8d-8711-ce4775f57ed9", scenario!="default"}[1m]))

metrics.name: k6FailureRatio
metrics.query: 1 - (sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"505adc35-02c2-4b8d-8711-ce4775f57ed9", expected_response="true", scenario!="default"}[1m])) / sum by (testid) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{testid=~"505adc35-02c2-4b8d-8711-ce4775f57ed9", scenario!="default"}[1m])))
